name: Baked Clams Casino (Bob Stein)
recipeIngredient: 3 Dozen littleneck clams, on the half shell
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a bowl, mix together breadcrumbs, paprika, olive oil, and chopped garlic.
3. Place clams in a flat baking dish.
4. Mount some of the breadcrumb mixture on each clam.
5. Cut bacon slices into quarters and place a piece on each clam.
6. Bake for 25 minutes, or until bacon is crisp.
7. Serve with lemon wedges, optionally on a bed of heated rock salt.
